title: Xbox faces complaints over possible layoffs and studio closures
summary: Unionized workers demand protection, while the company pauses agreements with third parties and Undead Labs studio is at risk.

title: Samsung, SK Hynix, and Micron sued for fixing memory chip prices
summary: A class action lawsuit accuses the manufacturers of colluding to artificially increase DRAM memory prices.

title: Netflix prepares a live-action adaptation of Persona
summary: The series based on the popular RPG will feature the director of Deadpool and the writer of Star Trek: Picard.

title: Cyberpunk Edgerunners releases trailer for its second season
summary: The Netflix series returns with a more violent story and a new main character.

title: Valve forces cancellation of Steam Machine Companion Cube case due to infringement
summary: Dbrand withdraws the product after failing to obtain permission from Valve, while surcharges on pre-orders increase.

title: GTA 6 breaks pre-order records on Xbox and will not have a physical edition
summary: Microsoft announces record orders, although the game will not be released on disc and sparks disputes between consoles.

title: Nintendo announces a Direct focused on Splatoon Raiders for June 30
summary: The event will show news of the new game in the saga, with trailers and in-depth gameplay.

title: Sony confirms it will not sell PS6 at significant losses
summary: The company seeks to balance rising component costs and avoid losses on its next console.

title: CD Projekt simplifies its brand by renaming itself to CD Projekt Red
summary: The name change aims to unify the corporate identity, although it causes confusion due to the similarity with the main studio.

title: Activision promotes Call of Duty: Modern Warfare 4 highlighting that it will not be on Game Pass
summary: The game's advertisements emphasize that it will not be available on Xbox's subscription service.

title: Pokémon TCG card shortage and price increase spark controversy
summary: While one of the best cards of 2026 is nearly impossible to get, Target is accused of inflating prices and DeNA receives subsidies.

title: Ubisoft faces developer strike and remembers its late co-founder
summary: The Rainbow Six Siege studio in Barcelona protests against layoffs, while the CEO mourns his brother's death.

title: 'Supergirl' fails at the box office and earns less than 'Morbius'
summary: The superheroine's debut does not meet expectations and generates comparisons with the notorious failure of Morbius.

title: Tekken 8 adds Roger Jr. and Bob as DLC characters
summary: The fighting game adds content referencing popular memes and new fighters.

title: Marvel Tokon dazzles with its animations and hidden references
summary: The new action title offers fluid combat and a Deadpool full of nods to the comics.

title: Meccha Chameleon becomes so popular that fans play it in real life
summary: The camouflage game triumphs on Steam and players organize games off-screen.

title: Supermassive Games CEO steps down after layoffs and the release of Directive 8020
summary: After leading the studio through restructurings and the premiere of its latest game, Pete Samuels resigns.

title: Baldur's Gate 4 is considered but the designer sees it unfeasible after the success of BG3
summary: The former Baldur's Gate 2 designer rejected the offer for considering it crazy to compete with Larian.

title: Planescape: Torment 2 was approved by Wizards but did not secure funding
summary: The project got the green light but no one invested, leaving the sequel in limbo.

title: A leak reveals Blizzard's ambitious plans for Warcraft
summary: A previously dismissed rumor now seems to reveal the next steps for the franchise.
